nodes.label: Data Preprocessing Pipeline (seed_data.py)
nodes.rationale: R3M encoding is NOT applied at preprocessing time; images stored as raw uint8 so backbone can be finetuned end-to-end during training. Two modes: wrist_state and full.

nodes.label: ResNetBackbone
nodes.rationale: Wraps torchvision ResNet with optional R3M weight init; backbone is always trainable (no freezing) so IQL gradients update visual encoder end-to-end.

nodes.label: R3M Package (Meta AI)
nodes.author: Suraj Nair (Meta AI)
nodes.rationale: Pretrained reusable representations for robot manipulation from diverse human videos (Ego4D). Used here as visual encoder initialization for IQL policy, not as a frozen encoder.

nodes.label: AWR-Style Actor Update
nodes.rationale: Advantage-weighted regression: exp(adv * temperature) * log_prob, clipped at 100. This is the offline RL actor update in IQL.
